channel.title: dex notes — dex digital sample library
channel.description: Dex Notes newsroom for artists, releases, entries, and Dex updates.

item.title: Help us seat Dex’s Founding Expansion Board
item.description: Dex opens nominations for a Founding Expansion Board to steward an always-free, CC-BY library of artist-made video and audio. Directors, Advisors, and Observers; ~6 hrs/mo; remote welcome. Details at dexdsl.com/board.

item.title: An‏‏‎nouncing dexFest 2024
item.description: On Oct. 9 - 11, Dex Digital Sample Library, ​​the open-access collection of archived, commissioned Creative Commons samples, presents dexFest 2024, a three-day recording arts festival featuring local LA artists and renowned multi-instrumental improvisers.

item.title: DEX PRESENTS: SUM‏‏‎MER GIVING 2024 – LA JAPAN ENSEMBLE GALA
item.description: The Japan Ensemble is hosting a fundraising gala presented by Dex Digital Sample Library at LA ARTCORE on Wednesday, July 17 from 7 PM to 9 PM. Click for tickets.

item.title: Help us save a college Japanese Ensemble!
item.description: Help us save a college Japanese music ensemble with a charitable donation today.

item.title: we started a library
item.description: after much hype, we finally launched our library to the public with drop featuring 10 recordings from artists across world.

item.title: SEBASTIAN SUAREZ-SOLIS
item.description: A tinkerer at heart, Sebastian performs on just about anything it can get its hands on, like…

item.title: CAMERON CHURCH
item.description: Cameron’s sound world can be described in a myriad ways, but one that seems to fit best in regards to his dex recordings is…

item.title: ETHAN BAILEY-GOULD
item.description: An ever-captivating improviser, Ethan Bailey-Gould pushes the boundaries of creative expression through his skillful exploration of both the electric guitar and guitar pedals as instruments.

item.title: MIDORI ATAKA
item.description: When we came to Midori with an inquiry regarding a possible dex recording, we had no idea she would record what is…
